languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

languages.text: {n}Техножрец выглядит ошеломленным.{/n} "Вы думаете я посмел бы расхаживать с анафемой, богомерзкой пародией на людской разум, величайшей ересью против Омниссии? Абсурд!"
{n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрец выглядит ошеломленным.{/n} "Вы думаете я посмел бы расхаживать с анафемой, богомерзкой пародией на людской разум, величайшей ересью против Омниссии? Абсурд!"

traits.locale_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, some sort of a blasphemous parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

{n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, some sort of a blasphemous parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"
{n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"
{n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"
{n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester wirkt verblüfft.{/n} "Denkt Ihr, ich würde es wagen, mit einem Anathema herumzulaufen, einer gottlosen Parodie des menschlichen Verstandes, der größten Ketzerei gegenüber dem Omnissiah? Was für eine absurde Idee!"
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Techpriester wirkt verblüfft.{/n} "Denkt Ihr, ich würde es wagen, mit einem Anathema herumzulaufen, einer gottlosen Parodie des menschlichen Verstandes, der größten Ketzerei gegenüber dem Omnissiah? Was für eine absurde Idee!"

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre semble stupéfait.{/n} « Vous pensez vraiment que j'oserais me présenter devant vous avec un anathème, une parodie profane de l'esprit humain, la plus grande des hérésies aux yeux de l'Omnimessie ? Quelle idée absurde ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre semble stupéfait.{/n} « Vous pensez vraiment que j'oserais me présenter devant vous avec un anathème, une parodie profane de l'esprit humain, la plus grande des hérésies aux yeux de l'Omnimessie ? Quelle idée absurde ! »

languages.text: {n}技术神甫一脸错愕。{/n}“您难道认为，我胆敢带着一件禁忌之物四处走动？那可是对人类心智的亵渎模仿，是悖逆欧姆尼赛亚的最大异端！这想法简直荒谬至极！”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫一脸错愕。{/n}“您难道认为，我胆敢带着一件禁忌之物四处走动？那可是对人类心智的亵渎模仿，是悖逆欧姆尼赛亚的最大异端！这想法简直荒谬至极！”

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote parece aturdido por la acusación.{/n} «¿Acaso cree que caminaría con un anatema, con una parodia blasfema de la mente humana, la mayor de las herejías contra el Omnissiah? ¡Qué idea más absurda!».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote parece aturdido por la acusación.{/n} «¿Acaso cree que caminaría con un anatema, con una parodia blasfema de la mente humana, la mayor de las herejías contra el Omnissiah? ¡Qué idea más absurda!».

languages.text: {n}技術司祭は唖然とした表情を浮かべる。{/n}"私がアナテマを、人間の心の冒涜的なパロディを、全知全能の神に対する最大の異端を、あえて持って歩くと思いますか？何というばかげた考えだ！"
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip şaşkına dönüyor.{/n} "İnsan zihninin saygısız bir parodisi, Hermesih'e karşı büyük kâfirlik olan bir lanetle dolaşmaya cüret edeceğimi mi sanıyorsunuz? Ne kadar saçma bir fikir!"
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest looks stunned.{/n} "Do you think I would dare walk about with an anathema, a profane parody of the human mind, the greatest heresy against the Omnissiah? What an absurd idea!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip şaşkına dönüyor.{/n} "İnsan zihninin saygısız bir parodisi, Hermesih'e karşı büyük kâfirlik olan bir lanetle dolaşmaya cüret edeceğimi mi sanıyorsunuz? Ne kadar saçma bir fikir!"
